mapper.select: SELECT id, operator_id, data_month, technology, lte_physical_site_num, lte_physical_cell_num, nr_physical_site_num, nr_physical_cell_num, total_site_num, total_cell_num FROM operator_total_site ORDER BY id

SELECT id, operator_id, data_month, technology, lte_physical_site_num, lte_physical_cell_num, nr_physical_site_num, nr_physical_cell_num, total_site_num, total_cell_num FROM operator_total_site WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, operator_id, data_month, technology, lte_physical_site_num, lte_physical_cell_num, nr_physical_site_num, nr_physical_cell_num, total_site_num, total_cell_num FROM operator_total_site WHERE operator_id = #{operatorId} ORDER BY data_month

SELECT id, operator_id, data_month, technology, lte_physical_site_num, lte_physical_cell_num, nr_physical_site_num, nr_physical_cell_num, total_site_num, total_cell_num FROM operator_total_site WHERE data_month = #{dataMonth} ORDER BY operator_id

SELECT id, operator_id, data_month, technology, lte_physical_site_num, lte_physical_cell_num, nr_physical_site_num, nr_physical_cell_num, total_site_num, total_cell_num FROM operator_total_site WHERE operator_id = #{operatorId} AND data_month = #{dataMonth} ORDER BY technology

SELECT id, operator_id, data_month, technology, lte_physical_site_num, lte_physical_cell_num, nr_physical_site_num, nr_physical_cell_num, total_site_num, total_cell_num FROM operator_total_site WHERE technology = #{technology} ORDER BY operator_id, data_month
